product.title: All In One Makeup Kit, Travel Makeup Kit, Makeup Gift Set, Makeup Kit for Women Full Kit, Makeup Bundle Includes Foundation Eyeshadow Palette Lipstick Eyeliner Mascara Contour Stick Cosmetic Brush Set
featureBullets: 【All in One Makeup Kit】This Makeup Gift Set includes everything you need for a full-face look: face foundation makeup, eyeshadow palette, contour palette, Contour Stick, eyebrow powder, powder puff, lipstick, eyeliner, Marscara, cosmetic brush and travel bag. Designed to cater to all your daily makeup essentials, this kit is perfect for both beauty beginners and seasoned pros.

【High Quality Make Up Kit】Indulge in our High-Quality cosmetics, lovingly crafted with skin-friendly ingredients that pamper your skin. The collection is designed for harmonious application, ensuring beginners and professionals alike can weave magic with waterproof, long-lasting makeup looks that celebrate your unique beauty without compromising skin health.

【Great Gifts for Ladies】On the lookout for a gift that will touch the heart? Elevate the art of gifting with this comprehensive makeup set, ideal for any lady venturing into the world of cosmetics. It’s the quintessential gift for Valentine's Day, Christmas, birthdays, and beyond, sure to thrill moms, daughters, and friends alike with a gesture that acknowledges their beauty and grace.

【Special For Any Occasion】Whether you're stepping into the makeup realm for the first time or refining your artistic flair, this kit is your companion in creating unforgettable moments. It promises to add a sprinkle of enchantment to holiday celebrations, making every day a little more extraordinary.

【Cruelty-free Cosmetics】 We care about our planet just as we care about your skin. We are proud to say we have never & will never test on animals. And we also don't allow others to test on our behalf, either.

specification.value: #51,109 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #65 in Makeup Sets
Comprehensive makeup kit with high-quality, skin-friendly, cruelty-free products for full-face looks.

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find this makeup kit to be a great starter set that comes with many items and offers good value for the price. They appreciate its color options and durability, with one customer noting it includes everything needed for a full-face makeover.

reviews.reviewText: Love the quality of makeup you receive. It was worth the price I spent. I do wish they would of added lip liners in this kit . It is all nice m as keep andthe colors are beautiful. I love this kit!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 13, 2026
reviews.customer: It has been working wonderfully for my Husky. This product has been 5he best so far to train my dog. I give it a 10

reviews.reviewText: I’m vegetarian and cruelty free matters to me. This product says it’s cruelty free on multiple sites, and I’m hoping that’s true, b/c some brands aren’t. The colors in this palette are very pretty. It comes with e wry supply you could ever need to apply makeup, including the applicators. The foundation was the wrong color, but everything else was beautiful. It even has an eyebrow pencil exactly like one I bought months ago that I paid almost as much for as this entire kit! The lip balms are great, but very small. The tote is cute and dainty, easy to carry and stores e writhing with space left over. The blushes are shades of pinks and Brian’s and can double as a bronzer for the darkest shade. It’s a wonderful value and makes a great gift for the girl or guy in your life who is experimenting with makeup or learning a new trade.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on May 22, 2025

reviews.reviewText: This was nice loaded with products all individually boxed. I bought this for my 11 year old but I will be buying this again for gifts to hand out. This was by far the best makeup set I have ordered on Amazon.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on October 31, 2025

reviews.reviewTitle: You will be getting a lot for the money nice amounts of product
reviews.reviewText: Hello , you get a lot of things and a lot of eye and lip things that will last a long while, very nice.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 28, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I love this makeup kit, it's the most complete, it's super beautiful, I love it and all its products are of very good quality
